{{Quote|Come on, Chewie, we're heading for the Imperial data vault on Krake's Planet. We should be able to get what we need there.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="marvel63" />}}
'''Krake's Planet''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Demetras sector/Legends|Demetras sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> that was home to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Krake Data Vault]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A small, rocky world, Krake's Planet was home to a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large slugs that carved massive, twisting tunnels through the planet's surface. Krake Data Vault was formed out of a type of [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] cocoon created by the slugs, and repurposed by the Imperials to control the slugs' movements and contain the main personnel records for the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial military]]. Krake's Planet was visited by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] heroes [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], on a mission to retrieve information on Imperial double agent [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] that resulted in the vault's destruction.<Ref name="marvel63" />

==Behind the scenes==
Krake's Planet appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Walter Simonson|Walt Simonson]], illustrated by [[Tom Palmer]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel63" />
